name: Apple Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pork chops using melted pork chop fat trimmed from the meat and 1 tablespoon of butter. Season to taste and set on a hot platter. Keep warm.
2. Slice the apples into half-inch thick pieces. Add them to the pan with the remaining tablespoon of butter, sugar, and a few pinches of cinnamon or cloves.
3. Cook over medium heat for about 10 minutes, turning occasionally until some of the apples are browned.
4. Arrange the cooked apples around the pork chops and serve.
